---
title: "Project"
author: "Valentino Salerni"
date: "2026-04-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Libraries
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
```

# Load Data
```{r}
univExpenses <- read.csv("Expenses_All_Sports_and_Men's_Women's_and_Coed_Teams_2023.csv")
univFinance <- read.csv("f2223_f1a_rv.csv")
univGrad <- read.csv("gr2023_RV.csv")
```

# Clean Data
```{r}
univExpensesCleaned <- univExpenses %>%
  select(UNITID, Classification.Name, Grand.Total.Expenses, Institution.Name) %>%
  mutate(sportsExpenses = Grand.Total.Expenses) %>%
  select(-Grand.Total.Expenses)

univFinanceCleaned <- univFinance %>%
  select(UNITID, F1C191) %>%
  mutate(totalExp = F1C191) %>%
  select(-F1C191)

univGradCleaned <- univGrad %>%
  filter(GRTYPE %in% c(8, 9)) %>%
  select(UNITID, GRTYPE, GRTOTLT) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = GRTYPE,
              values_from = GRTOTLT,
              names_prefix = "grtype_") %>%
  rename(cohortSize = grtype_8, completed = grtype_9)

univData <- univExpensesCleaned %>%
  inner_join(univFinanceCleaned, by = "UNITID") %>%
  inner_join(univGradCleaned, by = "UNITID") %>%
  mutate(gradRate = completed / cohortSize,
         spendRate = sportsExpenses / totalExp) %>%
  filter(grepl("^NCAA", Classification.Name)) %>%
  mutate(division = case_when(
    Classification.Name == "NCAA Division I-FBS" ~ "D-I FBS",
    Classification.Name == "NCAA Division I-FCS" ~ "D-I FCS",
    Classification.Name == "NCAA Division I without football" ~ "D-I no football",
    grepl("Division II", Classification.Name) ~ "D-II",
    grepl("Division III", Classification.Name) ~ "D-III"
  ))

```

# EDA
```{r}
univData %>%
  group_by(division) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_spend = mean(spendRate),
    median_spend = median(spendRate),
    sd_spend = sd(spendRate),
    mean_grad = mean(gradRate),
    median_grad = median(gradRate),
    sd_grad = sd(gradRate),
    correlation = cor(spendRate, gradRate)
  )

ggplot(univData, aes(spendRate, gradRate, color = division)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = percent) +scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  labs(x = "Athletic Spending Share",
       y = "6-year Graduation Rate",
       color = "Division",
       title = "Athletic Spending Share vs. Graduation Rate by Division")

ggplot(univData, aes(spendRate, gradRate)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = percent) +scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  labs(x = "Athletic Spending Share",
       y = "6-year Graduation Rate",
       title = "Athletic Spending Share vs. Graduation Rate")

ggplot(univData, aes(x = division, y = spendRate)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(y = "Athletic spending / Total expenses", x = NULL)

ggplot(univData, aes(x = division, y = gradRate)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  coord_flip()

# Coefficient plot: within-division slopes with 95% CI
coef_data <- univData %>%
  group_by(division) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(gradRate ~ spendRate, data = .), conf.int = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(term == "spendRate")

coef_data <- univData %>%
  group_by(division) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(gradRate ~ spendRate, data = .), conf.int = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(term == "spendRate")

ggplot(coef_data, aes(x = estimate, y = division, color = division)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high), height = 0, linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  labs(x = "Slope: Δ Graduation Rate per Unit Δ in Spending Share",
       y = NULL,
       title = "Within-Division Regression Slopes (95% Confidence Interval)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

# Tests
```{r}
univData %>%
  group_by(division) %>%
  do(tidy(lm(gradRate ~ spendRate, data = .))) %>%
  filter(term == "spendRate")

univData %>%
  group_by(division) %>%
  do(glance(lm(gradRate ~ spendRate, data = .)))

# Pooled
summary(lm(gradRate ~ spendRate, data = univData))

# Additive model: same slope, different intercepts by division
mod_additive <- lm(gradRate ~ spendRate + division, data = univData)
summary(mod_additive)

# Interaction model: slopes differ by division  
mod_interaction <- lm(gradRate ~ spendRate * division, data = univData)
summary(mod_interaction)

# F-test: do the slopes actually differ across divisions?
anova(mod_additive, mod_interaction)

# One-way ANOVAs for completeness
summary(aov(gradRate ~ division, data = univData))
summary(aov(spendRate ~ division, data = univData))

par(mfrow = c(2,2))
plot(mod_interaction)
```
